name: The Charles Schwab Corporation
description: The Charles Schwab Corporation is an American multinational financial services company that provides a comprehensive range of brokerage, banking, and financial advisory services. Founded in 1971, the firm pioneered the discount brokerage model and has since expanded to offer wealth management, asset management, and custody services to both retail and institutional clients. Headquartered in Westlake, Texas, the corporation operates through its various subsidiaries, including Charles Schwab & Co., Inc., to deliver investment products and financial solutions to millions of clients globally, maintaining a significant presence in major financial centers.
